summary: Add Atlas awareness to template/AGENTS.md — Before ANY Action checklist and scanning guidance

resolution.summary: Added Atlas awareness to template/AGENTS.md with 3 targeted changes: (1) Added item 6 to Before ANY Action checklist in Step 2B referencing elcs/references/ for Atlas consultation, (2) Added DATA_PROCESS_ATLAS.md scanning bullet to Step 2A Scan the Project list, (3) Added references/ directory with DATA_PROCESS_ATLAS.md to Adoption Protocol directory tree.
